description.ko: 완벽한 흑요석 구조가 데이터와 기하학의 회귀적 폭풍으로 산산조각 나는 디지털 혼돈에 대한 탐구입니다.
description.en: A study of digital chaos where a perfect obsidian structure shatters into a recursive storm of data and geometry.

prompt: A brutalist #1A1A1A obsidian monolith of KURO-X undergoing a violent yet mathematically perfect geometric deconstruction. The structure is fracturing into thousands of sharp #808080 polygonal shards and #C0C0C0 pixel-sorted glitch fragments, suspended in a clinical #FFFFFF digital vacuum. Heavy digital noise, scanlines, and intense chromatic aberration cut through the composition. High-contrast cinematic lighting with razor-sharp ray-traced reflections on fragmented glass-like surfaces. 8k resolution, Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, capturing chaos within absolute order.
